name: census-of-words
description: The Census of Words: per-settlement name-gloss truthfulness, per-species lexicon Neogrammarian regularity and exposure soundness, the hue-depth pack-depth baseline, and the name-collision/length distributions re-measured after Task 9's glossed compounds replaced the free-stem naming pool — the etymology/lexicon baseline at author-time scale (Campaign 20, The Words, spec §9).
